commands.observed: RUN: plan-002-tests: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/forkproof/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'not integration']; 9 passed, 1 deselected in 0.04s

RUN: integration-forkpoint: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/forkproof/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'integration']; 1 passed, 8 deselected in 70.80s (0:01:10). This exports the real HUD trace boundary, resolves Docker registry base-image identity, runs a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over task-relevant paths, replays 29 accepted trace tool calls into a fresh Modal Mongo sandbox, then creates/restores an orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint, persists its immutable record, verifies negative restore rejection cases without provider fallback, and records allowlisted restored-sandbox surface inventory.
RUN: lint: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'ruff', 'check', 'docs/plans/scripts']; All checks passed!
PASS: 22 text file(s) are at most 500 lines
FAIL: 4 validation error(s): status must be complete, completed_at is required, complete manifest cannot have blockers, and commands[4] did not exit 0.

checks.name: Plan 002 command routing
checks.evidence: docs/plans/repo-map/COMMANDS.json now maps plan-002-tests and integration-forkpoint to verified pytest argv with PYTHONPATH=src under a narrow documented ownership exception.

checks.name: Six behavior cases
checks.evidence: tests/forkproof/forkpoints/test_core.py covers valid capture, valid restore, boundary mismatch, history mismatch, grader mismatch, unsupported mode, partial cleanup, finalized-record immutability, and environment source-digest coverage against the repo-native contract with a deterministic local provider.

checks.name: Integration readiness
checks.evidence: tests/forkproof/forkpoints/test_integration_readiness.py runs forkproof.forkpoints.integration_probe, which exports the accepted HUD trace into a redacted boundary summary, runs a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over /app, /data/db, and /var/log/mongodb.log markers, replays accepted trace tool calls, creates/restores an orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint through the repo-native contract, persists docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/forkpoint-record.json, and writes docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/integration-readiness.json.

checks.name: Real HUD/Modal ForkPoint completion
checks.evidence: Not complete: evidence now has a redacted HUD trace boundary export, a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip, replay-derived snapshot/restore evidence, an orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint created from a retained Modal sandbox handle, combined source/base image identity evidence, restored-sandbox negative security probes, writable/import surface inventory, and live negative restore checks. The already-finished historical HUD trace still has no live executable sandbox handle attached, and full branch security acceptance remains outside Plan 002.

checks.name: Orchestrated live-boundary ForkPoint
checks.evidence: docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/live-boundary-forkpoint.json records fork point fp-c2adfb186abac17f61ac4824, Modal Filesystem Snapshot im-01KVKRSVCSKF89KF283WDW6G0G, boundary token/history hash, combined image digest forkpoint-image-sha256:bd0a13edfd43cff2f866325ea5eb81d22d87fd09dc1db29f356231088a17c4ee, MongoDB fsync quiescence, query hash equality after restore, grader-output hash after restore, and block_network/no-secrets/resource labels with /root/.env, Docker socket, and metadata network negative probes. It also records writable/import surface inventory with allowlisted Python environment keys and boundary, history, grader, and unsupported-mode restore rejections with no provider restore fallback. docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/forkpoint-record.json persists the immutable ForkPoint record with content digest f1018091028ec243f9448c8485b5e5c5a845f9c33097323f441b70412a27bfec. Post-audit note: this live artifact predates the reference_solution.sh source-digest coverage fix and must be regenerated before any complete manifest claim.

checks.name: Environment source digest coverage
checks.evidence: tests/forkproof/forkpoints/test_core.py verifies environment_source_digest changes when envs/mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine/task_assets/reference_solution.sh changes. A local audit computed the corrected source digest as source-tree-sha256:5a5ff1aeca8f4600cb0d890ecc012a9510873ca3c4780b0f17575ff684775a49 and the corrected combined image identity as forkpoint-image-sha256:dc11b737edf6fe985d7698754a6e218fb39bc383f2bc5edbd3f3a7a51ff295d6, but live HUD/Modal regeneration was not run after this fix.

artifacts.description: In-progress Plan 002 evidence manifest recording exact Done-when command observations, real Modal/HUD evidence, retained-handle ForkPoint artifacts, and remaining STOP conditions.
Living-doc log updated with Plan 002 progress, surprises, decisions, outcomes, best-practice fix discussion, and remaining STOP conditions.
Plan 002 ForkPoint capture/restore contract, immutable JSON store, deterministic local snapshot provider, and integration-readiness command.
Behavior tests and integration-readiness test for the Plan 002 ForkPoint feature.
Integration-readiness artifact naming the local-provider ForkPoint id, Plan 003 handoff keys, and remaining real-system gaps.
Redacted accepted HUD trace export: event count, event-stream digests, selected final scenario-evaluate boundary, and hashed tail event metadata.
Real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over task-relevant marker paths with block_network, no secrets, resource labels, and prohibited mount checks.
Replay-derived Modal Filesystem Snapshot from accepted HUD trace tool calls: replay count, skipped failed calls, snapshot id, query.py hash, grader-output hashes, and policy labels.

Orchestrated accepted-trace rerun ForkPoint from a retained Modal sandbox handle: ForkPoint id, boundary token, history hash, combined image digest, Filesystem Snapshot id, restore handoff keys, MongoDB quiescence, query hash, grader hash, policy labels, restored-sandbox negative security probes, writable/import surface inventory, and negative restore checks.

Persisted immutable ForkPoint record reloaded from the repo-native store: required interface fields, content digest, source evidence refs, snapshot identity, history hash, environment identity, and policy labels.
Image identity evidence combining Docker registry base manifest for mongo:7.0, checked-in environment source-tree digest, and the Modal build recipe used by the retained-handle ForkPoint probe.

skips.name: Atomic source-sandbox boundary capture
skips.reason: The accepted HUD trace can now be exported, redacted, replayed, and captured from a retained Modal sandbox handle during an orchestrated rerun. There is still no provider handle to the already-finished historical sandbox instance from the original HUD run.

skips.name: Full branch security proof
skips.reason: The Modal probes record block_network, no secrets, resource labels, prohibited mount checks, absent /root/.env, absent Docker socket, blocked metadata network, Python path, allowlisted Python env, writable path map, and task asset hashes. Full adversarial branch isolation remains Plan 003-owned or acceptance-gated.

blockers.name: No live executable state for accepted historical boundary
blockers.evidence: docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/live-boundary-forkpoint.json proves an orchestrated accepted-trace rerun can pause with a retained Modal sandbox handle, create a repo-native ForkPoint, snapshot the filesystem, restore it, and run task-visible, negative security, surface inventory, and negative restore probes. docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/image-identity.json binds Docker registry base manifest sha256:8ecb514b00bdcc0bde67ef4e6c330385377a9dc68e24ee94e28c07c891647348 plus source tree and Modal recipe, but the source-digest code now additionally covers reference_solution.sh and the live artifacts have not been regenerated under that corrected digest. The ForkPoint is still not the already-finished historical sandbox instance from the original HUD run, and full adversarial branch security acceptance remains outside Plan 002.
blockers.required_next_step: Either accept the orchestrated rerun as the canonical source ForkPoint for later plans, or obtain provider-level access to the original historical sandbox instance. Also rerun integration-forkpoint with explicit approval for external HUD/Modal execution so the image identity, live-boundary ForkPoint, persisted record, and manifest command output are regenerated under the corrected source digest, then accept the recorded security inventory/probes as sufficient for Plan 002 or add the remaining adversarial branch-isolation proof before setting the manifest complete.

notes: The previous COMMANDS.json start blocker is unblocked in this PR under a user-approved narrow ownership exception.
No final Plan-002-complete claim is made, and the real orchestrated ForkPoint is not claimed to be the original historical sandbox instance.

Post-audit fix: source digest coverage now includes reference_solution.sh, which is copied into the Modal task assets. The corrected digest inputs invalidate the prior combined image digest for completion purposes until live evidence is regenerated.
